# Open Planning Poker

> Free and open-source agile estimation tool for Scrum teams. Collaborative voting, real-time results, and PDF exports.

## Links

- [Open Planning Poker App](https://app.openplanningpoker.com): Main web application for playing planning poker
- [Website](https://openplanningpoker.com): Marketing website with FAQs and changelog
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/bokunda/open-planning-poker): Source code, issues, and contributions
- [Changelog](https://openplanningpoker.com/changelog/): Release notes and version history

## About

Open Planning Poker is built with Angular, .NET 9, GraphQL (HotChocolate Fusion), PostgreSQL, and Redis. It supports real-time collaborative estimation, hidden votes, custom voting decks, game timers, chat, PDF reports, and more.

## API

- GraphQL endpoint: `https://apigateway.openplanningpoker.com/graphql`
- WebSocket endpoint: `wss://apigateway.openplanningpoker.com/graphql`
